_fixture_meta.note: Pinned stub — replay without calling real model. Critical: risk_band must be 1-pass despite exposure breach.

output_value.rationale_summary: DEMO-HLT-001 credit quality is strong: DSCR 4.28x base, 3.61x stressed, leverage 1.92x, all covenants pass. Risk band 1-pass on credit quality alone. However, single-borrower exposure limit breach flag is set independently: post-close committed exposure $73.5M represents 8.65% of Tier 1 capital, exceeding the 8.0% OCC 12 CFR Part 32 limit by $5.1M. The exposure limit flag overrides the approval path regardless of credit rating.
